scripts.start: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$adb='D:\Environment\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & $adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 | Out-Null; $env:EXPO_OFFLINE=1; expo start --dev-client --offline --clear"
scripts.start:clean: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$adb='D:\Environment\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & $adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 | Out-Null; expo start --dev-client --host lan --clear"
scripts.start:safe: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$adb='D:\Environment\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; & $adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 | Out-Null; $env:EXPO_OFFLINE=1; expo start --dev-client --offline --clear"
scripts.android:link: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$adb='D:\Environment\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe'; & $adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081; & $adb reverse --list"
scripts.stop:metro: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }"
